title: RUSTINS Quick Drying Radiator Enamel Satin 250ml– Durable, Long-Lasting Finish for Radiators That Stands the Test of Time
features: Speedy Radiator Makeover: Rustins Quick Dry Radiator Enamel Paint transforms your radiator with a fast-drying formula, giving it a fresh, white finish in no time.
Heat Resistant and Durable: Engineered for the demands of radiators, this enamel paint offers heat resistance and durability, ensuring long-lasting radiance.

Effortless Application - ADD TO CART now: The easy-to-use formula allows for hassle-free application, making radiator refinishing a quick and satisfying DIY project. ADD TO CART now for instant radiance.
Smooth and Even Coverage: Achieve a smooth, even finish with Rustins' superior formulation, providing a professional look to your radiator makeover.
Versatile White Shade: The classic white shade complements any room decor, adding a touch of elegance to your space while enhancing heat efficiency.
description: From the manufacturer About Us In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture with £50. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the best brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. Rustins products sell throughout the UK to home DIY enthusiasts and professionals who want quality and innovative products.
